businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and commercial AI data analytics platform leader — Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), AIP (AI platform) triple-axis
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and commercial organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+70% YoY), adjusted operating margin 57%. Friday close $150.95 (-1.66%). AIPCon 9 (3/12) held — GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, Ondas, World View, LG CNS mission-critical partnerships announced. Polymarket + TWG AI sports betting integrity platform unveiled. NVIDIA sovereign AI DC co-announcement. FY2026E US commercial +115% growth guidance. Market cap $361.0B, P/E ~240x, Forward P/E ~114x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts: Gotham/Apollo — defense, intelligence agencies, NATO (~55% revenue)
Commercial contracts: Foundry/AIP — enterprise AI platform, Boot Camp strategy (~45% revenue)
SaaS model: Annual subscriptions + expansion-based. Net Dollar Retention 120%+

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme premium. Reflects growth story and monopolistic AI positioning.

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Still high valuation even on FY2026 estimates. PEG 2.55.

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Explosive growth. US commercial +109% leading the charge.

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: High-margin SaaS model. Adjusted operating margin 57%.

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier among software companies. Maximized pricing power.

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: FCF margin 46.94%. Half of revenue converts to free cash flow.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 Mission-Critical Partnerships Explosion (3/12)
growthDrivers.description: BusinessWire (3/12): GE Aerospace (military aviation maintenance), Centrus Energy (nuclear AI), Ondas (drone ISR), World View (stratospheric ISR), LG CNS multi-year contracts. Enterprise + defense simultaneous expansion.

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket Sports Betting Integrity Platform — New TAM Pioneer
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/13): Polymarket + TWG AI building sports integrity platform powered by Vergence AI engine. Prediction markets as entirely new TAM.

growthDrivers.title: NVIDIA + Palantir Sovereign AI DC — Global AI Infrastructure Partner
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): Turnkey sovereign AI DC co-announcement. AIP + NVIDIA infrastructure accelerating nation-level AI adoption.

growthDrivers.title: US Commercial +115% Growth Guidance — FY2026
growthDrivers.description: Motley Fool (3/10): US commercial revenue $1.5B (+109%) → FY2026 +115% guidance. Boot Camp strategy's high conversion rate.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ year track record in government/defense AI. Security clearance levels create entry barriers. Ontology platform as the unique AI-human collaboration interface.

moats.description: Highest US DoD/intelligence agency security clearances. Competitors cannot enter.
AI/human agent 'tool factory.' Unmatched in battlefield planning and target identification.
5-day intensive pilots to acquire enterprise customers, then expand company-wide. High conversion rates.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General purpose vs. Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI competitor. Smaller scale and profitability

competitors.name: Anduril
competitors.detail: Defense AI startup. Fast-growing but small vs. Palantir

analystOpinions.notableComment: 20 analysts Buy consensus, $193.75 (+28%). MarketBeat $192.68. Median $200. Valuation concern vs. growth momentum divided.

risks.title: Extreme valuation — P/E 240x, Forward P/E 114x
risks.description: Growth is excellent but valuation demands flawless execution. Earnings miss = sharp decline risk.

risks.title: Stock-based compensation dilution — shares +4.67% YoY
risks.description: Annual share count increase of 4.67%. Per-share value dilution is a long-term risk.

risks.title: Government budget cut risk
risks.description: 55% of revenue dependent on government. Budget cuts would impact pipeline.

risks.title: Trading below 200-day MA at $163
risks.description: Below 200-day MA at $162.81. Technical weakness signal.

risks.title: Alex Karp CEO risk
risks.description: Founder CEO's strong personality is a double-edged sword. Succession plan unclear.

buyReasons.title: AIPCon 9 partnership explosion — concrete contracts secured
buyReasons.rationale: GE Aerospace, Centrus, Ondas, World View, LG CNS multi-year mission-critical contracts. Revenue visibility improved.

buyReasons.title: US commercial +115% guidance — explosive growth
buyReasons.rationale: Boot Camp strategy's high conversion rate. Enterprise AI adoption accelerating. TAM expanding.

buyReasons.title: FCF margin 47% — cash generation machine
buyReasons.rationale: Half of revenue becomes free cash flow. D/E 0.03, net cash $6.95B.

buyReasons.title: NVIDIA partnership — AI infrastructure level expansion
buyReasons.rationale: Sovereign AI DC co-announcement. Positioned as core partner for nation-level AI adoption.

overallOpinion: Palantir at $150.95 trades below the 200-day MA ($163) despite the AIPCon 9 partnership explosion.
FY2025 revenue +70%, US commercial +115% guidance, FCF margin 47% — fundamentals are impeccable.
Polymarket sports AI, NVIDIA sovereign DC, and other new TAM entries strengthen the growth story.
However, P/E 240x and SBC dilution of +4.67% demand flawless execution to justify the valuation.
For investors with long-term growth conviction: potential buying opportunity. For valuation-sensitive investors: still an uncomfortable level.
